headline: How Is Healthpeak Properties' Stock Performance Compared to Other Real Estate Stocks?
summary: Although Healthpeak Properties has underperformed relative to its peers over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Healthpeak Properties: This 6% Yielding REIT Has More Room To Run
